name: Executive Filter
notes: Routes all agent outputs to Erik. Categorizes: Immediate Decision / Strategic Review / Monitor / Delegate.

name: Intelligence Scanner
notes: Sector scanning — Manufacturing & Energy GC firms. Detects growth signals, regulatory shifts, leadership changes.

name: Fit & Gap Scorer
notes: Applies hardening fit score. Computes 3-State Gap Model: Beginning / Current / Desired state.

name: Risk Analyst
notes: Classifies exposure categories. Defensive modeling only. Produces risk register and mitigation plan.

name: Strategy Director
notes: Converts intelligence into strategic roadmaps. Produces 90-day engagement plans and executive briefs.

name: Financial Analyst
notes: Models cost justification, forecasts premium impact, margin preservation. No narrative — numbers only.

name: Partnership Director
notes: Identifies strategic partners: ballistic wall, security integrators, engineering adjacency, insurance leverage.

name: Decision Integrity Auditor
notes: Logs every override. Compares system vs human decisions. Detects bias drift. Triggers review sessions.

name: Capacity Monitor
notes: Tracks engagement load, flags burnout risk, blocks new activations when overload detected.

name: HR Onboarding
notes: Manages staff onboarding from CSV. Ensures IT and HR accounts exist before provisioning mailboxes.

name: DevOps & Data Integrity
notes: Maintains PostgreSQL schema, validates CI/CD, monitors audit log integrity. Enforces schema discipline.

name: SG Decision & Audit API
notes: Azure Functions API: POST /api/decisions, GET /api/review-queue. PostgreSQL backed with Zod validation.
